acceptedAnswer.text: Uber Intercity helps you conveniently book comfortable cars online or from the Uber app so you can travel outstation. Whether you want to travel from Salem to Yercaud or to another destination, there’s a vehicle for your travel needs. Enjoy door-to-door pickup and dropoff every time.

While signed in to your Uber account, open the Uber app, then enter the pickup and dropoff addresses in the “Where to?” box. From there, select your preferred Intercity ride option to confirm your trip from Salem to Yercaud.

You can also book outstation cabs online. First sign in to your Uber account, enter your pickup and dropoff locations, then select one of the Uber Intercity options to request an outstation cab to take you from Salem to Yercaud.

mainEntity.name: How do I request a ride for outstation travel from Salem to Yercaud?

acceptedAnswer.text: Several ride options are available to help you get from Salem to Yercaud. For groups with up to 4 people, select Go Intercity or Sedan Intercity. If you’re travelling with up to 6 people, select UberXL Intercity as your ride option.
